content.full_text:
August 6, 1991

California Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Legal Division:

I am the treasurer for Supervisor Carole Migden, a county supervisor for the City and County of San Francisco.

I recently called your office with a question about transfers between controlled committees. I spoke with Ms. Linda Moreaux, and it was my understanding that if a local jurisdiction has a valid campaign contribution limit based on a campaign cycle, rather than on a fiscal year cycle, that transfers between controlled committees are still barred under Proposition 73.

Could you please confirm that my understanding is correct. San Francisco has a local campaign contribution limit of $500 per election cycle. Is it then true that we cannot write a check from our campaign or officeholder account to another campaign or officeholder account?

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Sincerely yours,

Paul Herman
Treasurer
